# Hey, I'm Crist Yaghjian 👋

### IT Student | AI Enthusiast | Creative Coder | Problem Solver
---
### 🚀 About Me
- 🎓 **IT Student** at University of Aleppo (4-th year) from Syria
- 👨‍🏫 **Lead Instructor** teaching Python & Arduino to 35+ students
- 🤖 Passionate about **AI/ML, robotics, and automation**
- 🏆 **Award-winning** robotics project creator
- 🎨 **Creative coder** blending art, music, and technology

---

### 🔧 Tech Stack

[![](https://camo.githubusercontent.)](https://camo.githubusercontent.)

---

### 📌 Current Focus
- 🤖 Developed **AI debate app**
- 🚗 Building **wireless robotics** projects (Crover series)
- 🏠 Creating **Desktop apps** and digital solutions
- 📚 Pursued **Deep Learning & ML specializations**
- 🎯 Now trying to learn **Backend**

---

### 🏆 Key Achievements
- 🥇 **Local Science Fair Winner** – Arduino robotics project
- 📜 **Deep Learning Specialization** – Darrebni certified
- 🎯 **Machine Learning Specialization** – Advanced ML techniques
- 🌍 **Multilingual** – Armenian, Arabic, English, Turkish
- 📸 **Creative Content** – AI music & symbolic photography
